Class ConfigImpl

java.lang.Object

  • Method Details

    • createTab

      public ConfigTabBuilder createTab(String name)
      Description copied from interface: Config
      Creates a new tab for the config. Use this if you want to split your config into multiple tabs.
      Specified by:
      createTab in interface Config
      Parameters:
      name - The name of the tab
      Returns:
      A new config tab builder

    • createDefaultTab

      public ConfigTabBuilder createDefaultTab()
      Description copied from interface: Config
      Creates the default tab for the config. Use this if you don't want to use multiple tabs for your config. This will create the single default tab to which you can add all your properties.
      Specified by:
      createDefaultTab in interface Config
      Returns:
      The default config tab builder

    • createScreen

      @Deprecated public ConfigScreen createScreen(@Nullable net.minecraft.client.gui.screens.Screen parent)
      Deprecated.
      Description copied from interface: Config
      Creates a screen for the config. Use this with Minecraft.setScreen(Screen) to show the config screen.
      Specified by:
      createScreen in interface Config
      Parameters:
      parent - The parent screen to return to when closing the config screen
      Returns:
      The config screen

      Returns:
      Whether any property has been changed since the config was last saved.

    • saveIfDirty

      public void saveIfDirty()
      Description copied from interface: Config
      Saves the config only if any property has been changed since last saving.
      Specified by:
      saveIfDirty in interface Config

    • scheduleSave

      public void scheduleSave(Duration duration)
      Description copied from interface: Config
      Schedules a call to Config.saveIfDirty() with the specified delay. If this method is called again during that delay, the old delay is overridden and the time starts again. That makes it useful for debouncing repeated modification of a property from user input outside a config screen. If this method is invoked after every change of a property, it will only be saved once, assuming the delay is set longer than the gaps between property changes.
      Specified by:
      scheduleSave in interface Config
